title: Per-call TPS event storage with time-series queries

requirements.description: call_events table with per-call TPS data
requirements.acceptance: Table exists with columns: id, session_id, model, provider, input_tokens, output_tokens, duration, tps, created_at

requirements.description: Auto-record each API call as an event
requirements.acceptance: hook writes a row to call_events in addition to session_tps UPSERT
store.load_events(session_id, since, until) returns events in range
aggregate_by_model and aggregate_by_provider return grouped stats
Returns list of events with optional since/until query params
Returns per-model and per-provider aggregated trends
Events older than retention period are deleted on write
retention_days in plugin config, defaults to 7
Multiple threads writing events simultaneously don't corrupt data

success_criteria: call_events table exists and schema version is 3
Each hook call records an event row
REST API endpoints return correct data
New tests achieve >90% coverage of new code
